author: Robby Sneiderman
name: SwiGLU + EMA + AdamW TTT + EBLS Findings (Non-Record)
blurb: SwiGLU MLP replacing ReLU-squared, EMA replacing SWA, eval-time AdamW TTT on MLP weights. Includes EBLS exploration: learned shrinkage gammas discover MLP weights converge to full sharing while attention retains trace specialization. Statistical framing of TTT as posterior adaptation with adaptive shrinkage.
